title: Star Wars: The Official Magazine
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{MagazineSeries |image=[[File:StarWarsMagazineUK1.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' |publisher=[[Titan Magazines]] |start date=[[April]] [[1996]]Date listed on magazine cover |end date=[[February]] [[2007]] |genre= |issues=67 }} The '''''Star Wars'' Magazine''', originally published as '''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine''''' and alternatively styled as the '''''Official UK Star Wars Magazine''''', was a magazine published every two months by [[Titan Magazines]] in the [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|UK]], and also shipped to other countries such as Australia. Much of the content was taken from ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' and initially also included comics from [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]]. From #25 onwards the magazine was titled simply ''Star Wars'' on the cover, and the credits and official websites referred to it as ''Star Wars'' Magazine Titan also released UK printings of ''[[Official Star Wars 20th Anniversary Commemorative Magazine]]'' and Episode I and II souvenir magazines. The ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: Official Episode III Souvenir Movie Guide]]'' was printed as #57 of the regular title, whilst #60 contained most of ''[[Vader: The Ultimate Guide]]''; the short story ''[[In His Image]]'' was not included but was printed in the following issue. February 2007 saw the publication of the sixty-eighth issue, after which it was merged with ''Star Wars Insider'' after Titan gained the publishing rights for that. In the UK the numbering carried on from where ''The Official Magazine'' had left off. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: The Official Magazine}} ===Issues=== File:StarWarsMagazineUK1.jpg|[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 1|Issue #1]]
